offer: For amazon sellers processing 10–20 shipments/month, high shipping costs cause cash flow gaps. We automate shipping data aggregation and cost calculation instead of manual tracking and reporting of shipping data.
problem: High shipping costs and lack of detailed logistics reporting.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for amazon sellers
Indie Hackers discussions on shipping workflows
DM outreach to amazon sellers with demo video
Engage in community forums for shipping tools
try_it: Let users try shipping cost calculator on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for first users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as reusable templates
Set default reminder schedules for users
Allow CSV import for existing shipping data
Streamline onboarding process for new users
